summary: Phase G testing complete: Stripe recurring subscriptions with 7-day trial and AI Virtual Analyst feature. All backend APIs working correctly. Frontend flows validated including paywall, upgrade page, and AI analyst feature gating.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/billing/config returns 6 packages (starter/pro/investor × monthly/annual), USD currency, 7-day trial, correct prices
Backend: POST /api/billing/checkout with invalid package returns 400
Backend: POST /api/billing/checkout with valid package returns Stripe checkout URL and session_id
Backend: GET /api/billing/status/{session_id} before payment returns active=false
Backend: GET /api/billing/subscription returns subscription info with plan and status
Backend: GET /api/ai/analyst/{ticker} for Pro/Investor returns analysis with summary, stance, thesis, risks, catalysts, confidence (0-100)
Backend: GET /api/ai/analyst/{ticker} second call returns cached=true and is fast (12h cache working)
Backend: GET /api/ai/analyst/{ticker} for plan='none' returns 403 with code='feature_locked'
Frontend: Paywall working - new user registration redirects to /app/upgrade
Frontend: Upgrade page displays all 3 pricing cards (Starter, Pro, Investor)
Frontend: Pricing cards show correct monthly prices (US$4.97, US$12.97, US$24.99)
Frontend: '7 days free' trial badge visible on all pricing cards
Frontend: Monthly/Annual toggle present with 'Save ~20%' label
Frontend: Settings > Assinatura tab shows current plan (Investidor for superadmin)
Frontend: AI Analyst tab visible for Investor plan with stance badge, summary, confidence bar, thesis, risks, catalysts
Frontend: AI Analyst content localized to Portuguese (pt-BR) for superadmin
action_item_for_main_agent: MANUAL TEST REQUIRED: Complete full Stripe checkout E2E flow with test card 4242 4242 4242 4242 (expiry 12/34, CVC 123, ZIP 12345) to verify: (1) trial subscription creation, (2) return redirect to /app/upgrade?session_id=..., (3) polling GET /api/billing/status/{session_id} returns active=true and subscription_status='trialing', (4) GET /api/auth/me shows upgraded plan. Backend endpoints are working correctly; only the actual payment completion needs manual verification.

success_percentage.frontend: 90% (automated tests passed; manual Stripe checkout completion pending)
